name: runtime_boundary
note: numerical budget cannot alter runtime physics or playable tuning

name: run_setup_required
value: consume only manifest-backed OpenFOAM run setup rows
note: run setup rows are the only inputs

name: incompressible_tip_mach_budget
value: require helical tip Mach at or below 0.30 before using incompressible steady rotor cases
note: all current setup rows are below the Mach limit

name: near_blade_cell_budget
value: target near-blade cell size no coarser than D/128 before force or torque extraction
note: near blade scale is explicit per propeller diameter

name: wake_core_cell_budget
value: target wake-core cell size no coarser than D/48 for induced-velocity and momentum-power checks
note: wake core scale is explicit per propeller diameter

name: courant_timestep_budget
value: limit timestep by blade-cell Courant freestream Courant and two-degree azimuth advance
note: suggested timestep is blade-cell Courant limited for all six rows

name: domain_padding_budget
value: use at least 8D radial 4D upstream and 12D downstream padding around the rotor
note: domain padding is derived from current propeller diameter

name: low_reynolds_model_review
value: flag 0.75R chord Reynolds below 10000 for laminar or transition-model review
note: two static anchors require low Reynolds model review

name: no_runtime_or_gameplay_auto_apply
value: numerical budgets are offline CFD authoring evidence only
note: numerical budget has no runtime or playable mutation authority
